div1.entryFree: Register, subst. account regularly kept, record: O night, dim r. and notary of shame, Lucr. 765. thy (time's) --s and thee I both defy, Sonn. 123, 9. r. of lies, Compl. 52. as you hear them (my follies) unfolded, turn another (eye) into the r. of your own, Wiv. II, 2, 194. let the world rank me in r. a master-leaver, Ant. IV, 9, 21.
